transcript.text:
(One peaceful afternoon in the warm sunlight...)
(Daytime drinking?!) Shall we pour a drink first?
(I'm on full steam with this one here today)
(Jinro, the original soju, revamped with zero sugar!!!)
(And a lovely seafood party, perfect for soju snacks...!)
(Amazing)
(Let's start the game) There's no such thing as 'moderation' in alcohol
(A drink with a snack)
(And another one)
What should I do...?
It feels so good...!!!!
(Happy eating with Jinro, back with zero sugar)
(Let's begin!)
(Drink in moderation) (Warning: Excessive alcohol causes strokes, dementia, and birth defects)
(One afternoon with a lighting sun)
Hello, everyone

So today,
I'm here to have a light drink
(Perfect day for soju!) I was just craving a drink
(Today's restaurant for some drinking) It's day drinking, right?
(Located in Gangnam-gu, Seoul)
('Sashimi Hwang' in Gangnam-gu, Seoul)
(Straight-up paid promotion LOL) This is a paid promotion LOL
(A feast of fresh seafood to greet you at the door...!)
Wow, that's a good setup today
So, apparently Jinro
(The original soju, Jinro!) has been renewed with zero sugar
Is it renewed with a pink label?
I've never seen the pink label!
It's written here, zero sugar!
It's been renewed with zero sugar
(Pink Label) So, in honor of that, they released a pink edition

- Is the pink one a limited edition? - Yes
(I can't resist the limited edition...!) Can I take one? LOL
I want the limited edition...
(Menu is here!) Thank you
There's the 'main' set with 3~5 assorted sashimi
The sub-set has two types of sashimi and seasonal seafood
Cuttlefish is also on the seasonal menu
It is grilled in butter
The combination of soju and pollock roe is perfect for the ladies!
Then...
Can I have one main and sub-set each
Semi-dried grilled cuttlefish
Grilled avocado pollock roe
Oh, there's shishamo!!
Then one grilled avocado pollock roe
- with grilled shishamo - Yes

- and assorted sashimi - And the semi-dried grilled cuttlefish
(Order completed) Thank you
(Can't get enough of the pink edition...) I want this
(I'm kind of pretty!)
(Today's snack is a 'fresh seafood party')
(And today's main menu & sub-menu!)
(Tzuyang, fascinated by the toad's charm LOL) Zero sugar made it slimmer
(I've been on a bit of a diet) That's funny LOL
(Can you see my slim figure...?)
(Now let's start the fire, shall we?)
(Smoked cuttlefish)
(Avocado with pollock roe)
(Tzuyang's favorite drunchies, grilled shishamo)
(Here are your drunchies) Thank you
(That's marvelous...!) It's a half-and-half mix of seafood and sashimi
- Semi-dried grilled cuttlefish - Wow, that's a lot

- One grilled shishamo - Yes
- Pollock roe alone will taste salty - Okay
- So please eat it with avocado or dip it in the mayo sauce - Thank you
- You're going to drink Jinro zero sugar, right? - Yes, thank you
(Setup complete!) Wow, that's delicious! It's a perfect drink snack
Shall we pour the drink first?
Jinro has been around for 99 years,
and it's going to be 100 years next year
(Shall we get started...?)
(Endless love for limited edition LOL) Ah, limited edition soju
I'll give this a try first
Wow, it tastes exactly the same! Is this really zero sugar?
Normally, when I drink soju,
I tend to frown and go like, 'Kya'
But I like the clean, soft flavor and the smooth finish of Jinro
Wow, it's so nice

(Snack Time) Wow, that cuttlefish is so plump
Amazing
Let's mix it up
(Shake up the sauce...!)
(Crazy flavors that give a headache...)
Wow, perfect snacks for soju lol
(This calls for another shot...)
(Next is the grilled avocado pollock roe!) Top it with the avocado!
So delicious
I'm going to only drink Jinro from now on!
(Welcome, Tzuyang...!)
To the perilla leaf
(+ 2 pieces of halibut)
(+ Garlic)
(+ Chogochujang*) *Sweet and sour red chili paste
Add a piece of seaweed to that

(With fish roe on top...!!) This is legit!
Look at this alcohol snack, it's amazing
(Can't hold in the smile...)
Delicious!
Next up, a bite of salmon!
(Drink up)
This is such a happy mukbang
(Looks genuinely happy)
Shishamo! Shishamo!
Delicious
Wow, these flavors really call for soju
(Warning: Excessive alcohol causes strokes, dementia, and increases the risk of birth defects)
Wow, but this...
has a clean finish! It's so clean!
If you look here, it says zero sugar
Wow, it's so clean...!

The one I had earlier was so delicious
Grilled avocado pollock roe!
You can't drink alone like this
- Let me pour you a drink - Thank you, sir
- It's my honor - Oh, it's my pleasure
- Enjoy the food - Thank you
Along with our aged sashimi,
I took a lot of consideration on the bowl
for the freshness of the sashimi
That's why we put ice on top of the bowl
(Makes the sashimi fresher...!) to keep the sashimi fresh and delicious
- So please! Enjoy! - Thank you, I'm enjoying it so much thanks to you!
What's the alcohol content in this soju?
Oh, zero sugar as 16% alcohol, that's just right
My alcohol tolerance...
(Closer to a lightweight drinker...) is not that great, actually

After drinking 2 bottles...
I start to get a bit dizzy lol
2 bottles of soju is a lot!
(Never heard of it) Oh, really?
(Well, compared to what she eats...lol) No, but I'm eating like 20 servings
But drinks...
There's a spoon worm!
Spoon worms taste best with chojang*! *Vinager with sweet and spicy chili paste
This spoon worm is so good!
It's not overly chewy, just a little bit of
softness mixed in, so it's pretty good
- But why are you drinking this by the glass? - What?
You have to take sips...
Why do you take sips?!
What's to point of drinking in sips?
Just try it!

(Sipping on alcohol isn't a part of my lexicon...!!!!) I've never had that stuff in my life
This will be my first time!
Look at that confidence in drinking...!!
Let's try it the way the producer told me
Sipping... it...?
Don't say that you're sipping on it
Just say that you're savoring it
Oh, okay! I'll try savoring it...
And eat the snack immediately
(I wonder if his method will taste good...!!)
Hmmm....????????
Oh, the grilled cuttlefish tastes good!
(She doesn't like this method lol)
Let's top the salmon with pollock roe...!
(So proud of herself) It's really, really good
Wow, that's a lot of shishamo!

Huh? I think this is way more than 10
(They're even filled with roes...!)
(Slurp...)
(The producer is on the verge of crying LOL) I can hear you drooling all over the place
This Jinro soju...
goes well with sashimi
but probably also with meat
Pizza, fried chicken... It'll go well with all sorts of food
(A dieter's worst enemy) Dieters are sensitive to sugar, right?
(Enjoy the renewed Jinro Zero Sugar!) It would be better to drink alcohol with zero sugar too
Let's get this ready first
I want more avocado... Any more?
- I'll give you some avocado for free - Okay, thank you!
The avocado and
salmon tastes so good together
(Drink up)

I've already finished the whole bottle...? It's empty
- Excuse me! - Yes
- Can I have one cold one? - Okay, sure
Pink edition, please!
(2nd pink edition open...!)
This pink color is so pretty
I want this
The blue one and pink one
aren't different types of soju
The pink one is the limited edition
They're both 'Jinro Zero Sugar'
It's been renewed,
so all the future Jinro will be made zero sugar!
(The pink label that keeps catching the eye...) But I never saw pink in a bar or something
Can I take this???
(Obsessed with pink) I asked her earlier, but she didn't answer LOL

Let's try the sea squirts!
(Why are you smiling...?)
(What...?) What should I do
I'm so happy...
(That's the power of... day drinking...!)
I was so surprised at how good I drink!
This soju is super clean
(Brewing technology for 99 years) It's so clean and smooth that you can't even taste the bitterness...!
Who's the model for Jinro?
- (That's me the toad) - The toad
(I'm quite a famous toad lol)
Let's make one as Tzuyang toad
(How about me?)
(Confused...)
This alcohol tastes so good
(Loving service from the owner! The avocado's here!) Thank you

Awesome!
- Enjoy - Thank you
(So much love...) He gave me so much!
You only drank a little bit of the beverage
(What's up with this beverage lover...?) I've never had this little beverage in my life
For one drink of alcohol,
(That's a weird ratio) I usually drink 2 cups of the beverage
(Why are you laughing again...?)
I mean, I drank so much alcohol...
(Still noon) But the day is still so bright
(The world is brighter today...) It's literally broad daylight now LOL
But the snacks here are so good!
Especially the cuttlefish
and the avocado pollock roe
The sashimi is good too
(Grilled cuttlefish & avocado pollock roe is the top 2!) These 2 are the best!

We serve the cuttlefish in large portions
(Seafood ramen full of seafood!) So later, we add that cuttlefish to your seafood ramen
- I'll give you one free of charge... - Oh, really?!
Thank you, you're the best!
Before taking a bite of the cuttlefish!
(Aren't you enjoying it too much...?)
- I'll give you some soup! - Thank you
(Let's try the ramen!) I'll give you the seafood ramen for free!
(Very excited) Thank you
- I'll clean the table a bit for the ramen! - Thank you
(The amazing one coming in...) Your ramen is here
(Visually stunning seafood ramen...!) This is the seafood ramen with all kinds of seafood
Eat them with octopus and scallops
- Once the noodles cook, you can start eating - Thank you
The owner just told me that...
(Let's try the cuttlefish hack...) the cuttlefish tastes amazing inside here...

Looks delicious
(Everyone, go boil some water...) Wow, this is amazing!
(Her eyes are full of excitement LOL) Wow, this is no joke!
Let's try the soup first!
Wow!
This isn't just ramen soup!
Maybe because of the abundant seafood!
It's not just plain ramen
It tastes like a luxurious cuisine
(Try the soup and noodles together...!) Scoop up the soup!
(Give it up for ramen)
(Woe of drinking alone...) I have no one to make a toast...
(Toad...?)
(Picking on the toad for no reason... lol) Dude! LOL
I'll toast with my subscribers
Cheers!

Love you...!!
(Warning: Excessive alcohol causes strokes, dementia, and increases the risk of birth defects)
I added the cuttlefish like this
This texture is amazing!
Ooh, scallops!
Oh, she's...
definitely one of a kind haha
(She always eats like this...)
The last cup!
(Let's finish clean and smooth...!)
The last bite!
(Seafood with Jinro 'Zero Sugar' CLEAR!)
(Always drink in moderation!) Excessive drinking is bad for health, so let's stop here
I just had my first Jinro Zero Sugar today
Contrary to my expectations, it tastes exactly like the original Jinro
The renewed Jinro Zero Sugar is actually cleaner and smoother!

I really enjoyed it
I'm so happy
Anyways, I enjoyed my drink today!
Jinro Zero Sugar pink edition is out
